name: California Coast Credit Union East Village Branch
description_short: California Coast Credit Union's East Village Downtown San Diego branch offers full-service banking including checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards to San Diego County residents.
description_long:
California Coast Credit Union is a federally insured credit union serving members who live or work in San Diego, Riverside, Orange, Los Angeles, Ventura, Imperial, or San Bernardino counties. The East Village branch, located at 777 J Street in Downtown San Diego between Seventh and Eighth Avenues near Petco Park, operates as a full-service financial institution with both personal and business banking capabilities.

The branch offers comprehensive financial products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, IRAs, auto loans, home mortgages, credit cards, personal loans, and business accounts. Members can open new accounts, apply for various loan products, access 24-hour ATM services with fee-free withdrawals and check deposits, and obtain free cashier's checks. The branch is wheelchair accessible and maintains extended hours on weekdays and Saturday mornings.

What distinguishes this credit union is its member-focused cooperative structure, commitment to serving a seven-county region, and emphasis on community relationships. The East Village location's proximity to downtown San Diego and adjacent to Petco Park makes it accessible to both residents and workers in the urban core. Cal Coast emphasizes security awareness with warnings about website spoofing scams and maintains a dedicated Security Center.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, California Coast operates on a not-for-profit basis with profits returned to members. The institution holds NMLS ID# 407951 and ABA/Routing Number 322281578. Members benefit from fee-free ATM access across the network and straightforward account opening processes. However, as a regional credit union, it may have fewer locations and digital features compared to large national banks, and membership is limited to those living or working in specific counties. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fee-free ATM withdrawals at 24-hour walk-up ATM with cash and check deposit options
Free cashier's checks (one per day) with valid government-issued ID
Full-service branch offering account opening, auto loans, credit cards, business accounts, and home loans
Extended hours including Saturday morning service (9 am-2 pm) for working professionals
Wheelchair accessible location in downtown San Diego near Petco Park
Serves seven-county region (San Diego, Riverside, Orange, Los Angeles, Ventura, Imperial, San Bernardino)
Credit union structure returns profits to members rather than shareholders
cons: Limited to members living or working in specific California counties, excluding most of the U.S.
Street parking only at East Village location, which may be challenging in downtown San Diego
Website navigation is complex with multiple redirects and some broken links (business services page returns 404)
No mention of online account opening, mobile banking features, or digital-first capabilities on the branch page
best_for: San Diego County residents and employees seeking full-service banking with local branch access
Business owners in the seven-county service area needing business checking and loan products
Consumers prioritizing credit union membership and community-oriented banking
Downtown San Diego workers needing convenient lunch-hour or after-work banking services
diagnosis: California Coast Credit Union's East Village branch is best for San Diego County residents and employees seeking a full-service credit union with convenient downtown access, fee-free ATM services, and personalized account assistance. The primary caveat is strict geographic membership restrictions limiting eligibility to those living or working in seven specific California counties, making it unavailable to most U.S. consumers.
services: 24-hour fee-free ATM withdrawals and check deposits
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
